dialogues.text: You don't look so good. That's not my problem to solve, and I'm not going to pretend it is. Thirty, and keep moving. Everybody's happier when people keep moving.
dialogues.yes_response: Smart. I didn't see you, you didn't see me. That's the whole arrangement, and it's a good one.
dialogues.no_response: Wrong call. But alright. Keep moving anyway — that part of the advice was free of charge.

dialogues.text: I've been watching this block a while now. Long enough to know your face, your route, the rhythm of you. You've been making your little rounds. I need thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. Then I'll make sure your rounds keep running smooth. Smooth is a thing I can arrange.
dialogues.no_response: I'll remember that you said no. I remember most things. It's most of what the job is, really.

dialogues.text: I know who you've been visiting today. House to house, like a man saying goodbyes. I'm not here about any of that. I'm here for thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: Quiet transaction. That's how I prefer them, and I suspect that's how you prefer them too.
dialogues.no_response: You're sure about that? Think hard about what kind of day you're trying to have out here.
dialogues.alt_text: I know whose money's folded up in your pocket. I watched the hand it came from. I'm not going to ask where it's headed. Thirty, and I forget I noticed any of it.
dialogues.alt_yes_response: Good. Then I never saw it, and neither did you. The money was never anywhere. Easy.
dialogues.alt_no_response: Bold. Walking my block carrying that, looking me in the eye, and telling me no. I'll remember the boldness.

dialogues.text: Off duty means off the record — that's the only part of this badge I still believe in. Thirty. Nobody upstream of either of us finds out about it.
dialogues.yes_response: Good answer. Pretend this didn't happen, and I'll do you the same courtesy in return.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. Pretend it didn't happen either way — that part I'll give you for nothing. Consider it goodwill.

dialogues.text: I've got a situation at home. The kind you don't put in a report. Everybody's carrying something heavy this year, seems like. Thirty bucks toward mine.
dialogues.yes_response: I appreciate the discretion. You strike me as a man who understands how the machinery actually turns.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. I'll sort mine out on my own. You go take care of whatever's pulling at yours.

dialogues.text: This neighborhood runs better when there's an understanding between the people on it. You follow what I'm laying out for you? Thirty, and we understand each other.
dialogues.yes_response: Smart. Real smart. The kind of smart that gets a man through to evening. Have a good rest of your day.
dialogues.no_response: That's a shame, genuinely. You had the look of a reasonable person. First impressions, I suppose.

dialogues.text: Look. I'll be straight with you, which is more than I've managed all week. It's been a long one. I just need thirty. Cash, and we both move on.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. That's the most honest thing I've said since Monday, and you're the one who got it. Lucky you.
dialogues.no_response: Okay. You win this one. Get going before I remember I've got a quota and a bad attitude.

dialogues.text: Whatever it is you're trying to get done today — and you've got the look of a man with a list — thirty makes it go smoother. For both of us. That's the pitch.
dialogues.yes_response: Exactly. A quiet understanding between grown men. Pleasure doing business on a quiet street.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. The hard way it is, then. I did offer you the soft one. Remember that I offered.

dialogues.text: I'm not going to make this complicated for you — complication's for people with time to spare. Thirty. And you go on with your day, lighter by thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. You didn't see me, I didn't see you. Clean as a whistle. That's the spirit of the thing.
dialogues.no_response: You sure? You've got the look of a man with places to be and not much day left to be in them.

dialogues.text: You look like a man who's running short on time. I know the look — I've worn it. Thirty, and I'm out of your way for good. That's a fair price for a clear road.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. Go do whatever it is you're out here trying to do. I mean that one straight, no badge behind it.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. I hope the rest of your day treats you kinder than this stretch of it did. Go on.
